action.reasoning: Observation: Evaluation failed because checkpoint file /workspace/checkpoints/best.pt was missing. Analysis: The train.py initialized best_r2 = -1e9, but the computed validation R2 was -9.4e9 (worse), so the save condition never triggered. Additionally, the custom R2 calculation in float32 likely suffered numerical issues. Decision: Rewrite train.py to (1) save based on validation loss (best_loss = inf) which is reliably computed, (2) compute R2 in float64 for accurate logging, (3) retrain for 2 epochs to generate a checkpoint and immediately submit eval to validate the full pipeline and get a baseline score.
